text:
Manually verify the widget on a real iPhone + macOS desktop once signing exists:
tap-to-complete-in-place, the "+" Quick Capture link, and the whole-widget filter
deep link; confirm the snapshot cache refreshes after app, Share Extension,
Shortcuts, and in-widget writes. Requires a signed build (blocked by provisioning).
(Priority: medium. Labels: widget, verification.)
